data.body: Implement Copilot on top of the shared interactive session protocol instead of leaving it on a separate prompt-mode path. Choose a stable Copilot interactive/session entrypoint, keep follow-up turn transport open within the same session, normalize Copilot events into the shared event model, and enforce the same turn-result, session-end, close-input, watchdog, retry, and abort semantics used for the other interactive agents. Preserve existing model-selection support while removing Claude-specific interactive assumptions from the runtime.
data.title: Add interactive Copilot session support
